title: Milky Way Galaxy Minecraftified
description: Milky Way Galaxy Minecraftified is an edit of an existing resource pack by Stingray Productions. This edit changes the Milky Way to match the Minecraft style.
body:
Milky Way Galaxy Minecraftified is an edit of an existing resource pack by Stingray Productions. This edit changes the Milky Way to match the Minecraft style.

ORIGINAL PACK: https://resourcepack.net/milkyway-galaxy-night-sky-resource-pack/#gsc.tab=0

I emailed the original owner and he said the pack was in public domain so I can upload this
